schedule.details: Start the day with intention, not reaction. Hydrate with water, do light stretching, and plan your top 3 priorities. No phone.
Build your 'Runner' identity and energize your body for the day. Ideal time in Bien Hoa to avoid the peak heat. This is your protected time.
Post-workout nutrition with a protein-rich breakfast. Shower and prepare your workspace to begin work exactly on time.
Tackle your most cognitively demanding tasks. Use Pomodoro (50 min work / 10 min break). No distractions allowed.
Refuel your body and give your brain a complete break. Eat away from your desk. A short walk is ideal.
Complete your 6-hour workday. Focus on collaborative or less demanding tasks. Shut down work completely at 4 PM.
Decompress and handle life logistics. This is your buffer for errands, chores, family time, or a power nap.
Build your skills for career and personal growth. With work done, you can give this your full focus.
Wind down with your interests. Watch financial world videos or other relaxing entertainment to transition from 'work' mode.
Pre-sleep ritual to calm the mind. Must be a physical book to avoid blue light which disrupts sleep.
The foundation of everything. Recovery and memory consolidation. Keep your room cool, dark, and quiet.
